untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit 'fundamental analysis' and 'sentiment percentile ranking' filters which cannot be directly mapped to technical indicators. India_vix and momentum divergence are proxies but do not fully capture the multi-filter consensus requirement (fundamental + technical + sentiment percentile ranks). 'Bullish consensus reading > 85th percentile' lacks a direct indicator equivalent in the allowed set.
translation_notes: Approximated using: (1) india_vix as extreme sentiment proxy, (2) MACD histogram crossovers for momentum inflection/trend break, (3) RSI extremes for confirmation. Original signal emphasizes ALL THREE FILTERS must align—this translation captures technical consensus but cannot validate fundamental analysis or true sentiment percentile rankings. Pullback confirmation and swing-based stops are operationalized as prior bar extremes with 2 ATR implicit in stop_loss_pct of 2.0.
